plan_review_notes: Approved the event-bus slice. The scope is narrow and sequenced correctly after the current evolution hard-state work: publish evolution-scoped envelope events from existing repo-aware entry points and keep orchestration/surface changes out of scope.

plan_review_history.notes: Revised the generic scaffold into a concrete event-bus slice: publish evolution-scoped envelope events from read-only run orchestration, follow-up bridge, receipt projection, verification projection, and decision-envelope recording. Keep scope out of CLI/MCP surface additions and orchestration loops.

Approved the event-bus slice. The scope is narrow and sequenced correctly after the current evolution hard-state work: publish evolution-scoped envelope events from existing repo-aware entry points and keep orchestration/surface changes out of scope.

spec_review_notes: Freeze scope to evolution event-envelope emission only. The implementation may add a shared evolution event helper and emit events from run orchestration, follow-up bridge, receipt projection, verification projection, and decision-envelope recording. It must not add new CLI/MCP commands, orchestration loops, or promotion policy derivation.

normal_cases.name: `execute_evolution_run` writes `evolution.run.recorded` for a successful read-only run.

edge_cases.name: `project_followup_execution` and `project_followup_verification` write projection events with receipt/verification counts and stable lineage.
`record_evolution_decision_envelope` writes `evolution.decision.recorded` with promotion vs invalidation status preserved in the event payload.

exception_cases.name: A failing `execute_evolution_run` writes `evolution.run.failed` with failure stage and persisted artifact context.

verification_methods.target: execute_evolution_run writes evolution.run.recorded for a successful read-only run.
bridge_evolution_followup_request writes evolution.followup.requested with run/candidate/task lineage.
project_followup_execution and project_followup_verification write projection events with stable lineage.
record_evolution_decision_envelope writes evolution.decision.recorded with promotion vs invalidation preserved.
A failing execute_evolution_run writes evolution.run.failed with failure context.
